stamp.title: Switzerland Sitting Helvetia 5r brown (imperf)
stamp.summary: Switzerland Scott #13 (Michel #13), 1854 5r brown Sitting Helvetia (Strubel) imperforate definitive. Used with four margins. Handwritten label indicates Michel 13 and price €2.50.

stamp.title: Switzerland Sitting Helvetia 10r rose (imperf)
stamp.summary: Switzerland Scott #15 (Michel #15), 1854 10r rose Sitting Helvetia (Strubel) imperforate definitive. Used with heavy cancel. Handwritten label indicates Michel 15 and price €5.

stamp.title: Switzerland Sitting Helvetia 2r grey (perf 11.5)
stamp.summary: Switzerland Scott #43 (Michel #20), 1862 2r grey Sitting Helvetia definitive, perforated 11.5. Used. Handwritten label indicates Michel 20 and price €0.30.

stamp.title: Switzerland Sitting Helvetia 3r black (perf 11.5)
stamp.summary: Switzerland Scott #44 (Michel #21), 1862 3r black Sitting Helvetia definitive, perforated 11.5. Used. Handwritten label indicates Michel 21 and price €10.

stamp.title: Switzerland Sitting Helvetia 3r black (perf 11.5)
stamp.summary: Switzerland Scott #44 (Michel #21), 1862 3r black Sitting Helvetia definitive, perforated 11.5. Used with circular datestamp fragment. Handwritten label indicates Michel 21. and price €10.

stamp.summary: Switzerland Scott #49 (Michel #26), 1862 40r green Sitting Helvetia definitive, perforated 11.5. Used with part of a circular cancel. Handwritten label indicates Michel 26. and price €4.

stamp.summary: Switzerland Scott #51 (Michel #28), 1863 1f gold/bronze Sitting Helvetia definitive, perforated 11.5. Used with circular cancel. Handwritten label indicates Michel 28. and price €8.

stamp.title: Switzerland Sitting Helvetia 2r grey (perf 9)
stamp.summary: Switzerland Scott #52 (Michel #29B), 1867 2r grey Sitting Helvetia definitive, perforated 9. Used. Handwritten label indicates Michel 29 B and price €15.

stamp.title: Switzerland Sitting Helvetia 25r green
stamp.summary: Switzerland Scott #56 (Michel #32), 1867/78 25r green Sitting Helvetia definitive. Used. Handwritten label indicates Michel 32 and price €0.50.

stamp.title: Switzerland Sitting Helvetia 30r blue (perf 11.5)
stamp.summary: Switzerland Scott #57 (Michel #33A), 1867 30r blue Sitting Helvetia definitive, perforated 11.5. Left stamp of a pair/group labeled Michel 33 A+B for €21.
